name: Document Type Management
description:
As a hotel/hostel staff member
  I want to manage document types for guest identification
  So that I can properly validate and store guest identification documents

steps.name: I create a new guest with the following details:
the guest should be created successfully
the guest should have a unique ID
the guest creation event should be published
I create a new guest with invalid email "invalid-email"
I should receive a validation error about invalid email format
I create a new guest with email "existing@email.com"
I should receive an error about duplicate email
a guest exists with the following details:
I request the guest information by ID
I should receive the guest details
the details should match the created guest
I request the list of all guests
the list should contain all created guests
I update the guest's contact information:
the guest's contact information should be updated
the new information should be persisted

name: Guest Management
description:
As a hotel/hostel staff member
  I want to manage guest information
  So that I can track customer details and provide personalized service

steps.name: all returned reservations should have status "CONFIRMED"
all returned reservations should have status "CHECKED_IN"

name: Filter Reservations
description:
As a hotel manager  
  I want to filter reservations by various criteria with pagination
  So that I can efficiently manage and analyze booking data

steps.name: I create a reservation with the following details:
the reservation should be created successfully
the reservation should have a unique code
the reservation status should be CONFIRMED
the reservation creation event should be published
I create a reservation with check-out date before check-in date
I should receive a validation error about invalid dates
I create a reservation for non-existent guest "nonexistent@email.com"
I should receive an error about guest not found
I create a reservation for room "101" from "2026-03-02" to "2026-03-04"
I should receive an error about room availability
a confirmed reservation exists for the guest
the reservation status should be CHECKED_IN
the check-in date should be recorded
the room status should be OCCUPIED
a checked-in reservation exists for the guest
the reservation status should be CHECKED_OUT
the check-out date should be recorded
the room status should be AVAILABLE

elements.name: List reservations for a date range

steps.name: all reservations should be within the requested date range

elements.name: Calculate pricing based on stay duration

steps.name: I create a reservation for 7 nights in a Single room
the system should apply long stay discount
the total amount should reflect the discounted price

name: Reservation Management
description:
As a hotel/hostel staff member
  I want to manage reservations
  So that I can handle guest bookings and room occupancy

elements.name: Create a new room type successfully

steps.name: I create a room type with the following details:
the room type should be created successfully
the room type should have a unique ID
a room type "Single" exists with base price 50.00
I create a room with the following details:
the room should be created successfully
the room should have a unique ID
the room status should be AVAILABLE
I create a new room with number "101"
I should receive an error about duplicate room number
all returned rooms should have status AVAILABLE
the following rooms exist with room types:
I search for available rooms with capacity for 2 guests
I should receive rooms that can accommodate 2 or more guests
all returned rooms should have status AVAILABLE
a room "201" exists with status AVAILABLE
I change the room status to MAINTENANCE
the room status should be updated to MAINTENANCE
the room should not appear in available rooms list
I search for available rooms from "2026-03-02" to "2026-03-04"
room "301" should not be included due to existing reservation

name: Room Management
description:
As a hotel/hostel manager
  I want to manage rooms and room types
  So that I can organize accommodation inventory
